# System Prompt Library (Autogenerated)

This repository contains an **aggregated, up-to-date library of system prompts** for AI systems and autonomous agents.

## Overview

Over time, I’ve developed a variety of system prompts to support different AI applications and agent behaviors. These prompts were originally scattered across multiple repositories, experiments, and projects.

This repository now serves as the **centralized home for these prompts**, maintained through an end-to-end automation workflow.

## How It Works

* Prompts are entered into a structured database.
* Tagged entries marked for export are automatically added to this repository.
* Changes are pushed out via automation, ensuring the latest version is always available here.

## Purpose

This collection is intended for:

* Reuse across my AI projects
* Open source distribution (where permitted)
* Benchmarking and prompt engineering experiments

## Status

This repository is **autogenerated**. Please do not edit files manually unless contributing through the proper upstream sources.
